# ParagonNodeDefinition.HIcon property

`hIcon` (DT_UINT, `+8`). Not a SNO id; the first-party icon link — equals a [`ImageHandle`](../TexFrame/ImageHandle.md) (usually 0 here; the symbol handle is normally [`HIconMask`](./HIconMask.md)).

```csharp
public uint HIcon { get; }
```
